utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified with detailed information: (1) property has address, details, and price; (2) financing includes type, interest rate, term, down payment, monthly payment, fees, and status; (3) legal_services includes package, services_included, cost, and status; (4) moving_services includes package, services_included, cost, and status; (5) setup_services includes package, detailed utility breakdown, total_setup_costs, and status; (6) total_budget includes property_cost, legal_fees, moving_services, utility_setup, mortgage_fees, total_estimated_initial_cost, and monthly_commitments. Therefore, all six items are present and fully detailed.
